title: RevLens Product Event Contract v1.0.0
description: Contract for all product telemetry events. Events failing validation are routed to the dead-letter table, never dropped silently. Backward-compatible changes only within major version (add optional fields); breaking changes require v2 + dual-write migration window.

event_id.description: Globally unique, client-generated. Dedup key downstream.

event_name.description: Closed enum. New events require a contract PR, not ad-hoc emission.

event_ts.description: Client event time (UTC). received_ts is set server-side; the delta measures late arrival.

anonymous_id.description: Device-scoped id. Present pre- and post-auth. Joins to user_id via identify events.

properties.description: Event-specific payload. account_id required for authenticated events (enforced in dbt, not here, to keep the wire contract stable).
